metadata.description:
TDD implementation plan for SAM3 (Meta Segment Anything Model 3, arXiv:2511.16719) integration into the MinIVess segmentation pipeline.
SAM3 is a fundamentally different architecture from SAM2: - Dual: DETR detector + SAM2 tracker sharing a Perception Encoder (ViT-32L, 848M total) - Concept-driven segmentation via text/exemplar prompts (not spatial-only) - Input: 1008x1008, Feature dims: 1024 (ViT) → 256 (FPN neck) - Single variant (848M), ~16GB+ VRAM for inference
Three variants demonstrate SAM3 on MiniVess microvasculature: V1 (Vanilla): Shows how badly vanilla SAM3 works (expected DSC 0.05-0.20) V2 (TopoLoRA): Topology-aware LoRA adaptation (expected DSC 0.30-0.50) V3 (Hybrid): SAM3 features + DynUNet fusion (expected DSC 0.50-0.70)
DynUNet baseline: 0.824 DSC / 0.906 clDice (cbdice_cldice loss).
This is an MLOps platform demonstration. We pick low-hanging fruits from the literature and quantify SAM3's limitations. Scientific quality is paramount, but we demonstrate existing approaches, not develop SOTA.
NOTE: Existing SAM2-based code on feat/sam3-variants (commits cf3acf9, 1829789) was implemented by mistake. It provides reusable patterns (slice inference, gated fusion, factory dispatch) but uses the WRONG backbone. This plan replaces that code with correct SAM3 integration.
Key references: - Ravi et al. (2025). "SAM 3." arXiv:2511.16719 - Xiang et al. (2025). "TopoLoRA-SAM." arXiv:2601.02273 - SAM3-Adapter (2025). arXiv:2511.19425 - Li et al. (2025). "nnSAM." Medical Physics. - VesSAM: Kang et al. (2025). arXiv:2502.18185

lora_config.target_modules: mlp.lin1, mlp.lin2 (in all 32 ViT transformer blocks)
lora_config.spatial_adapter: 3x3 depthwise → ReLU → 1x1 pointwise, residual connection (66K params)

v1.name: Sam3VanillaAdapter
v1.purpose: Demonstrate how badly vanilla SAM3 works on 3D microvasculature
v1.architecture: Frozen SAM3 PE + trainable mask decoder, slice-by-slice
v1.prompting: Concept text: "microvasculature" OR null embeddings for automatic mode

v2.name: Sam3TopoLoraAdapter
v2.purpose: Test if topology loss + LoRA improves SAM3 for vessels
v2.architecture: SAM3 PE + LoRA (r=16) on FFN layers + spatial adapter + trainable decoder
v2.evidence: TopoLoRA-SAM: +15% clDice with LoRA + clDice on retinal vessels
v2.controlled_experiment: V1→V2: ONLY difference is LoRA + loss + spatial adapter

v3.name: Sam3HybridAdapter
v3.purpose: Test if SAM3 features complement DynUNet 3D decoder
v3.architecture: Frozen SAM3 PE (feature extractor, offline or live) + DynUNet encoder/decoder (trainable) + GatedCrossAttentionFusion (Q=F_3d, K/V=F_sam, gate_alpha init=0.0) + AxialProjection (1D Conv3d along Z for inter-slice context)
v3.safety: gate_alpha=0.0 means pure DynUNet at start; SAM features learned importance
v3.detach: f_sam.detach() blocks gradient flow to frozen SAM3 encoder

g1.action_if_fail: SAM3 completely useless; document and proceed with V2/V3

g2.action_if_fail: Topology loss does not transfer to SAM3 LoRA

g3.action_if_fail: SAM3 features provide no complementary value to DynUNet

task.name: SAM3 backbone wrapper and weight management
task.description:
Create Sam3Backbone that wraps SAM3's Perception Encoder (ViT-32L). - Load via build_sam3_image_model() or Sam3Model.from_pretrained("facebook/sam3") - Extract perception encoder features (1024-dim from ViT, 256-dim from FPN neck) - Handle HuggingFace authentication flow for gated model access - Provide _StubSam3Encoder for testing without SAM3 package installed - Feature caching: save/load extracted features to disk for 8GB VRAM workflow - Input preprocessing: resize to 1008x1008, normalize mean=0.5/std=0.5
Key difference from SAM2: SAM3 uses ViT-32L (not Hiera), 1008x1008 (not 1024), and has concept-driven prompting. The perception encoder is shared between DETR detector and SAM2-based tracker.
Package: sam3 (from git clone, not pip). Optional [sam3] extras dependency.

tdd_spec.tests: test_sam3_variants_dict_has_single_entry test_sam3_checkpoint_url_defined test_sam3_backbone_creates_with_stub test_sam3_backbone_frozen_by_default test_sam3_feature_shape_matches_spec_1024 test_sam3_fpn_feature_shape_256 test_sam3_input_size_is_1008 test_sam3_feature_cache_save_load_roundtrip test_sam3_stub_encoder_grayscale_to_3ch test_sam3_stub_encoder_resize_to_1008 test_sam3_hf_auth_prompt_when_no_token test_sam3_backbone_out_channels_property

task.name: Slice-by-slice inference for SAM3
task.description:
Update the existing slice_inference.py utility for SAM3's requirements: - resize_for_sam3(): bilinear interpolation to 1008x1008 (NOT 1024) - unresize_from_sam3(): restore to original spatial dimensions - slice_by_slice_forward(): iterate Z-slices through 2D SAM3 model - Grayscale→3-channel replication (SAM3 expects RGB) - Normalization: mean=0.5, std=0.5 (SAM3 standard)
This mostly reuses the existing slice_inference.py patterns but adjusts for SAM3's specific input requirements (1008 not 1024, different normalization).

tdd_spec.tests: test_resize_for_sam3_produces_1008x1008 test_unresize_restores_original_dims test_slice_by_slice_forward_output_shape test_slice_by_slice_handles_odd_z_dims test_grayscale_to_3ch_expansion test_sam3_normalization_mean_std test_resize_unresize_roundtrip_preserves_content test_slice_by_slice_with_cached_features

task.name: SAM3 mask decoder wrapper
task.description:
Create Sam3MaskDecoder that wraps SAM3's mask decoder head. - Accept 256-dim FPN features (or 1024-dim ViT features with projection) - Support null prompt mode for fully automatic segmentation - Support concept text prompt mode ("microvasculature") - binary_to_2class(): torch.cat([-logits, logits], dim=1) - Trainable: only ~2-4M params in decoder
SAM3's decoder is the mask prediction head from SAM2's tracker component. We use it in prompt-free mode (null embeddings) for automatic segmentation, or with concept text prompt for concept-driven segmentation.

task.name: ModelFamily enum and config extensions for SAM3
task.description:
Update ModelConfig to support SAM3 variants: - Keep existing SAM3_VANILLA, SAM3_TOPOLORA, SAM3_HYBRID enum values (already added for SAM2 code, but now they reference SAM3) - Add SAM3-specific config fields: - sam3_model_id: str = "facebook/sam3" (HuggingFace model ID) - concept_prompt: str | None = None (text prompt for concept-driven mode) - feature_cache_dir: Path | None = None (for offline feature caching) - use_spatial_adapter: bool = True - Update model_profiles: sam3.yaml with SAM3 VRAM estimates
The existing ModelFamily enum values from the SAM2 code are reused, but their implementations now point to SAM3 backbone.

tdd_spec.tests: test_sam3_family_enum_values_exist test_model_config_sam3_defaults test_model_config_concept_prompt_field test_model_config_feature_cache_dir_field test_sam3_model_profile_yaml_loads test_sam3_model_profile_vram_estimate

task.name: SAM3 feature caching infrastructure
task.description:
Implement offline feature extraction and caching for 8GB VRAM workflow: - extract_and_cache_sam3_features(volumes, cache_dir): extract PE features per-slice for all volumes, save as .pt files - load_cached_features(volume_id, slice_idx, cache_dir): load from disk - Sam3CachedFeatureDataset: PyTorch Dataset wrapping cached features - Disk budget: ~200MB per volume × 70 volumes = ~14GB SSD
This allows training on 8GB GPU by extracting SAM3 features offline (on a larger GPU or CPU with patience) and loading them during training. Essential for V3 hybrid which needs SAM3 features + DynUNet simultaneously.

tdd_spec.tests: test_extract_features_creates_cache_dir test_extract_features_saves_pt_files test_load_cached_features_returns_tensor test_load_cached_features_correct_shape test_cached_dataset_len_matches_volumes test_cached_dataset_getitem_returns_tuple test_cache_roundtrip_preserves_values

task.name: Sam3VanillaAdapter — vanilla SAM3 baseline
task.description:
Frozen SAM3 Perception Encoder + trainable mask decoder. Slice-by-slice 2D inference with concept prompt ("microvasculature") or null embeddings for fully automatic mode.
Purpose: Establish the SAM3 baseline. Expected to underperform DynUNet significantly (DSC 0.05-0.20) due to domain gap and 2D-to-3D mismatch. This is the intended scientific finding.
Forward pass: 1. For each Z-slice: resize to 1008x1008, replicate 1ch→3ch, normalize 2. Extract frozen PE features (1024-dim) 3. Project through trainable decoder with null/concept prompt 4. binary_to_2class → stack slices → SegmentationOutput
Loss: dice_ce (standard, no topology supervision) Checkpoint: save decoder weights only (not frozen encoder)

tdd_spec.tests: test_sam3_vanilla_creates_with_config test_sam3_vanilla_encoder_frozen test_sam3_vanilla_decoder_trainable test_sam3_vanilla_forward_output_shape test_sam3_vanilla_forward_predictions_sum_to_one test_sam3_vanilla_forward_metadata_has_architecture test_sam3_vanilla_get_config_returns_info test_sam3_vanilla_trainable_parameters_count test_sam3_vanilla_save_load_checkpoint_roundtrip test_sam3_vanilla_concept_prompt_mode

task.name: Sam3TopoLoraAdapter — topology-aware LoRA adaptation
task.description:
SAM3 Perception Encoder + PEFT LoRA (r=16) on FFN layers + spatial adapter + trainable mask decoder. Loss: cbdice_cldice.
Based on TopoLoRA-SAM (arXiv:2601.02273) adapted for SAM3: - LoRA targets: mlp.lin1, mlp.lin2 in all 32 ViT transformer blocks (SAM3 uses ViT FFN, not Hiera attention like SAM2) - Spatial adapter: 3x3 depthwise → ReLU → 1x1 pointwise (66K params) - LoRA config: r=16, alpha=32, dropout=0.1 - Training: AdamW (lr=1e-4), cosine decay, 50 epochs
Controlled experiment: V1→V2 ONLY changes are LoRA + loss + spatial adapter. Expected: +10-20% clDice over V1.
_find_sam3_ffn_modules(): find nn.Linear in ViT FFN blocks for LoRA targets (different from SAM2 where targets were Hiera attention q_proj/v_proj)

task.name: Sam3HybridAdapter — SAM3 features + DynUNet fusion
task.description:
Frozen SAM3 PE (feature extractor) + DynUNet encoder/decoder (trainable) + GatedCrossAttentionFusion + AxialProjection.
Architecture (from literature report Section 8.4): Input → DynUNet Encoder (3D, trainable) → F_3d Input → SAM3 PE (2D, frozen) → per-slice features → AxialProjection → F_sam GatedCrossAttentionFusion(Q=F_3d, K/V=F_sam, gate_alpha init=0.0) → DynUNet Decoder → cbdice_cldice loss
GatedCrossAttentionFusion: - Q from DynUNet (primary), K/V from SAM3 (auxiliary) - gate_alpha initialized to 0.0 (pure DynUNet at start) - f_sam.detach() blocks gradient flow to frozen SAM3 encoder - If SAM3 features unhelpful, gate learns to suppress them - Architecture CANNOT perform worse than standalone DynUNet
AxialProjection: - 1D Conv3d along Z axis for inter-slice context - Converts 2D SAM3 per-slice features into pseudo-3D volume
Supports two modes: 1. Live: SAM3 runs per-slice during training (requires 16-24GB VRAM) 2. Cached: Load pre-extracted SAM3 features from disk (8GB VRAM)
Based on nnSAM (Li et al. 2025): dual-encoder fusion pattern. Loss: cbdice_cldice

tdd_spec.tests: test_gated_cross_attention_output_shape test_gated_cross_attention_gate_starts_at_zero test_gated_cross_attention_gradient_flows_to_3d test_gated_cross_attention_no_gradient_to_sam_features test_axial_projection_output_shape test_axial_projection_handles_variable_z test_sam3_hybrid_creates_with_config test_sam3_hybrid_forward_output_shape test_sam3_hybrid_forward_predictions_sum_to_one test_sam3_hybrid_trainable_parameters_excludes_sam3 test_sam3_hybrid_save_load_checkpoint_roundtrip test_sam3_hybrid_cached_feature_mode test_sam3_hybrid_get_config_returns_info test_sam3_hybrid_dynunet_component_trainable

task.name: Experiment config YAMLs for SAM3
task.description:
Update experiment configs for SAM3 (not SAM2): - sam3_vanilla_baseline.yaml: dice_ce, 3 folds, 50 epochs - sam3_topolora_topology.yaml: cbdice_cldice, LoRA r=16, alpha=32 - sam3_hybrid_fusion.yaml: cbdice_cldice, DynUNet filters, feature caching - sam3_all_debug.yaml: all 3, 1 epoch, 2 folds (smoke test)
Key changes from SAM2 configs: - sam3_variant: removed (SAM3 has single model, no "hiera_tiny") - sam3_model_id: "facebook/sam3" - input_size: 1008 (not 1024) - concept_prompt: "microvasculature" (for V1/V2) - feature_cache_dir: "data/cache/sam3_features" (for V3) - lora_targets: "mlp.lin1,mlp.lin2" (not "q_proj,v_proj")

task.name: Model builder factory update for SAM3
task.description:
Update build_adapter() in model_builder.py to dispatch SAM3 families to the new SAM3-based adapters (not SAM2-based ones).
The factory already handles SAM3_VANILLA, SAM3_TOPOLORA, SAM3_HYBRID families — just update the lazy imports to point to the new SAM3 implementations.
Also update __init__.py exports.

tdd_spec.tests: test_build_sam3_vanilla_adapter test_build_sam3_topolora_adapter test_build_sam3_hybrid_adapter test_build_adapter_lazy_import_sam3 test_build_adapter_unknown_family_raises test_build_adapter_all_families_dispatch

task.name: Integration smoke test — SAM3 training loop
task.description:
Integration tests verifying each SAM3 adapter can: 1. Execute one training step (forward + backward) 2. Have gradients flow to trainable parameters 3. Work with AMP (mixed precision)
Uses stub encoder for CI (no real SAM3 weights needed).

tdd_spec.tests: test_sam3_vanilla_training_step test_sam3_vanilla_amp_compatible test_sam3_topolora_training_step test_sam3_topolora_amp_compatible test_sam3_hybrid_training_step test_sam3_hybrid_amp_compatible

task.name: Cross-model comparison infrastructure
task.description: Add cross_model_comparison() to comparison.py for comparing across model families (DynUNet vs SAM3 variants). Already partially implemented in current Phase 2 code — verify and add tests for SAM3-specific comparison scenarios.

task.name: SAM3 vs DynUNet evaluation runner
task.description: Script: scripts/evaluate_sam3_comparison.py Full 8-metric suite: DSC, HD95, ASSD, NSD, clDice, BE_0, BE_1, Junction F1. Loads trained models from MLflow, evaluates on test set. Already partially implemented — update for SAM3 model references.

task.name: SAM3 comparison report and figures
task.description: Script: scripts/generate_sam3_report.py Output: docs/results/sam3_comparison_report.md Already partially implemented — update for SAM3.

task.name: Champion selection integration with SAM3
task.description: Verify champion_tagger.py works model-agnostically with SAM3 runs. Already tested — confirm tests pass with SAM3 model identifiers.

task.name: PRD decision node for SAM3
task.description: Create docs/prd/decisions/L3-technology/sam3-integration.decision.yaml with correct SAM3 references (not SAM2). Add bibliography entries for SAM3 papers. Already partially created — update references from SAM2 to SAM3.

task.name: Go/No-Go gate evaluation script
task.description: Script: scripts/sam3_gate_evaluation.py Module: src/minivess/pipeline/sam3_gates.py Automates G1/G2/G3 gate checks from trained SAM3 models. Already implemented — verify correctness.

task.name: Architecture Decision Record for SAM3
task.description: Create docs/adr/0006-sam3-variant-architecture.md with CORRECT SAM3 architecture details (not SAM2). Already partially created — must update ALL references from SAM2 to SAM3: - Backbone: ViT-32L (not Hiera) - Input: 1008x1008 (not 1024) - Params: 848M (not 38.9M) - LoRA targets: FFN mlp.lin1/mlp.lin2 (not attention q_proj/v_proj) - Package: sam3 from github (not sam2 from pip)
